description: TaxDown is a Spanish tax-filing and tax-assistance service for individuals and businesses. Its site describes tools for preparing income tax returns, tax procedures, and business offerings such as employee tax benefits and access to public-administration data.
summary: taxdown.es exposes marketing sites and a consumer web app, but I could not find any public developer integration surface on taxdown.es or its subdomains: no documented HTTP/REST API, GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI.
